CAT17-006.headline: Depression In Older Adults
CAT17-006.subtitle: Recognizing and treating later-life depression
CAT17-006.figureLine: A single seated clay figure leans slightly forward with hands resting open in its lap, posture quietly weary yet attentive, conveying a heaviness that is being gently noticed and met.
CAT17-006.sceneLine: A low blue-indigo accent glow rises softly from beneath the figure's hands toward a faint pale blue-indigo arc above, suggesting warmth returning to a long, quiet season.

CAT17-018.headline: Depression And Chronic Illness
CAT17-018.subtitle: How the two interact in older adults
CAT17-018.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests with one hand laid gently over the other on its knee, shoulders carrying weight but settled, conveying steadiness held against a long ongoing strain.
CAT17-018.sceneLine: Two soft blue-indigo accent forms lean against each other beside the figure, their pale blue-indigo edges overlapping, suggesting two burdens that quietly press on and ease one another.

CAT17-019.headline: Social Determinants Of Depression
CAT17-019.subtitle: What shapes mood in older adults
CAT17-019.figureLine: A single standing clay figure stands with weight evenly settled, one hand reaching slightly outward as if toward something just beyond it, posture quietly searching for support.
CAT17-019.sceneLine: Several broad soft blue-indigo accent bands fan outward around the figure like surrounding ground, the nearest pale blue-indigo and the farthest dim, suggesting the wider conditions that hold a mood in place.

CAT19-012.headline: Paternal Postnatal Depression
CAT19-012.subtitle: The overlooked condition in new fathers
CAT19-012.figureLine: A single seated clay figure cradles a soft rounded form gently against its chest with both arms, posture tender but visibly tired, conveying quiet care carried under unspoken weight.
CAT19-012.sceneLine: A gentle blue-indigo accent halo surrounds the cradled form while a softer pale blue-indigo glow rests over the figure's bowed shoulders, suggesting protection extended to both at once.

CAT19-021.headline: Testosterone, Mood And Mental Health
CAT19-021.subtitle: How hormones affect mood in men
CAT19-021.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds a steady, balanced stance with both hands settled at its sides, posture quietly composed, conveying an inner equilibrium being maintained.
CAT19-021.sceneLine: A slow blue-indigo accent wave rises and falls in a smooth curve beside the figure, fading from accent to soft light blue-indigo, suggesting the gentle tidal shifts of mood beneath the surface.

CAT19-022.headline: Prostate Cancer Diagnosis
CAT19-022.subtitle: The psychological impact of diagnosis
CAT19-022.figureLine: A single seated clay figure sits very still with both hands pressed lightly together, head level and composed, posture quietly absorbing a heavy moment with held steadiness.
CAT19-022.sceneLine: A single broad soft blue-indigo accent form rests beside the figure with a steady pale blue-indigo light held at its center, suggesting difficult news met with calm and quiet resolve.

CAT19-024.headline: Heart Disease And Depression
CAT19-024.subtitle: A dangerous overlap in men
CAT19-024.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests one open hand gently against its own chest, posture tired but self-tending, conveying attention turned inward with care.
CAT19-024.sceneLine: Two soft blue-indigo accent rings overlap quietly beside the figure, their shared pale blue-indigo center glowing softly, suggesting two strains that meet and amplify one another.

CAT19-044.headline: Depression Mistaken For Laziness
CAT19-044.subtitle: Why low mood in men is misread
CAT19-044.figureLine: A single clay figure sits slumped with elbows on knees and head lowered, posture heavy and stilled, conveying a depleted weight that is so often misunderstood from the outside.
CAT19-044.sceneLine: A faint blue-indigo accent weight presses softly over the figure's shoulders while a quiet pale blue-indigo light waits at its feet, suggesting an unseen heaviness rather than any lack of will.

CAT19-061.headline: Reducing Male Suicide
CAT19-061.subtitle: Evidence-based strategies that protect
CAT19-061.figureLine: A single standing clay figure is gently steadied by a second, larger clay form curving protectively around it from behind, posture held and supported, conveying quiet life-affirming care.
CAT19-061.sceneLine: A continuous soft blue-indigo accent arc curves protectively around both forms, brightening to pale blue-indigo where they meet, suggesting steady reaching and a hand that holds on.

CAT20-021.headline: Chronic Pain And Depression
CAT20-021.subtitle: The bidirectional link between them
CAT20-021.figureLine: A single seated clay figure curls slightly inward with both arms drawn close, posture braced yet quietly enduring, conveying weight carried over a long stretch of time.
CAT20-021.sceneLine: A blue-indigo accent loop circles slowly back on itself beside the figure, its soft light blue-indigo thread feeding into each turn, suggesting two strains that quietly feed one another.

CAT20-024.headline: Diabetes And Depression
CAT20-024.subtitle: Managing two conditions together
CAT20-024.figureLine: A single seated clay figure holds two small rounded forms steady in its open palms, posture careful and balanced, conveying the patient daily work of tending more than one thing at once.
CAT20-024.sceneLine: Two soft blue-indigo accent orbs rest in a level pale blue-indigo cradle beside the figure, held in gentle balance, suggesting two conditions managed side by side with steady care.

CAT20-026.headline: Multiple Sclerosis
CAT20-026.subtitle: Neurological and emotional challenges
CAT20-026.figureLine: A single standing clay figure holds a slow, deliberate stance with one hand reaching out for balance, posture careful and resilient, conveying steadiness sought through uncertainty.
CAT20-026.sceneLine: Soft blue-indigo accent strands beside the figure drift gently apart in places and rejoin in others, their pale blue-indigo light holding the gaps, suggesting connection that wavers yet endures.

CAT20-033.headline: Post-Stroke Depression
CAT20-033.subtitle: Its effect on rehabilitation
CAT20-033.figureLine: A single clay figure rises slowly from a low seated posture, one hand braced on the ground for support, conveying the patient, effortful work of recovering ground.
CAT20-033.sceneLine: A series of soft blue-indigo accent steps ascends gently beside the figure, each one catching slightly more pale blue-indigo light than the last, suggesting healing regained one careful stage at a time.

CAT20-034.headline: Long COVID And Mental Health
CAT20-034.subtitle: Depression, anxiety, and brain fog
CAT20-034.figureLine: A single seated clay figure rests with one hand lifted softly toward its lowered head, posture clouded and slowed, conveying a quiet effort to find clarity through a lingering haze.
CAT20-034.sceneLine: A soft blue-indigo accent mist drifts loosely around the figure, thinning toward a pale blue-indigo clearing at the edge, suggesting fog that slowly, gradually begins to lift.
